title: Variable scope leak: $chkCascade local to function but referenced in event handler closure
description: In Invoke-PSEnvironmentScanner.ps1, the $chkCascade checkbox variable was created as a local variable inside Build-ScannerGUI but referenced by an event handler closure that fires after the function scope ends. This caused 'variable $chkCascade is not set' errors when the checkbox change event triggered.
detection_method: Runtime testing -- checkbox toggle in Environment Scanner GUI

fix_applied.description: Replaced $chkCascade references inside the event handler with $this (the sender parameter in WinForms events), which always refers to the control that raised the event regardless of variable scope.
fix_applied.pattern: Use $this (sender) pattern in WinForms event handlers instead of captured local variables
